BUS_ASC_NAME: Black Elk Energy Offshore Operations, LLC

OPERATIONAL_NARRATIVE: Anadarko utilized slickline to run a pulsed neutron log (PNL) to verify the 7-5/8" liner top depth and the AMP 4C zone depth for a potential recompletion in the future.

1.	Mobilized liftboat with slickline equipment to the MP 64 No. 3 single well caisson on August 28, 2016.
2.	Held safety meeting and discussed everyone's role during project.
3.	Rigged up 5K slickline lubricator system and tested to 1500 psig.
4.	Made a 2.25" gauge run to top of MRBP at 7,363' ELM.  POOH.
5.	TIH with tubing end locator and located the EOT at 7,177' ELM.
6.	Continued in hole and tagged bottom at 7,363'.  Confirmed no fill on top of MRBP.  POOH.
7.	Rigged up 2" dump bailer and made two runs, dump bailed cement on top of MRBP to 7,350'.  POOH.  
8.	Rigged down slickline equipment and demobilized liftboat.
9.	WOC.
Isolated chemical injection line mandrel at 8011' MD and set a straddle pack-off system. Operations completed on 08/28/2016.
Attempted to change zones. We were able to squeeze the zone we wanted to leave but a fish in the hole wouldn't allow us to perforate the new zone.
Well was zone isolated on 07/13/2016; surface plug was set on 09/14/2016.
Zone change to the QO Lower Sand
Temporarily abandoned well. (Please be advised this well will be reefed in place and all remaining casings will be cut 200' below waterline).
Open the lower hydraulic sleeve to allow commingling of the PL-B Upper and PL-B Lower with the PL-A zone.
